channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: Internet as a resource rather than a skill benchmark
item.description:
Notes

The internet can highlight people who are experts in any given area. Since these people are very experienced in their fields that have spent a large portion of time developing their skills. It is important to remember this as we are comparing our skills to those on the internet. We likely aren’t at the same level as these people. We should use the information we find on the internet as a resource for growing our own skills instead of using it as a sounding board to make us feel successful.

Source:

Manson, M. (2016). The subtle art of not giving a fuck: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life.
